docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md            # The documentation homepage.
    sample_module/      # sample module directory.
        sample.md       # A sample module documentation file.
    img/                # where all images are stored.
        favicon.ico     # Favicon for the site.

docs.title: Test
docs.text: This is a test file to check if the documentation is working correctly.
